papers.title: The Eichler--Selberg trace formula for Hilbert cusp forms, the class numbers of quartic CM fields, and their distributions
papers.summary: Motivated by Su's construction of Cohen-type Eisenstein series of half-integral weight over totally real number fields \cite{Su16}, we introduce a generalization of Hurwitz class numbers to totally real number fields. Using these generalized Hurwitz class numbers, we establish an Eichler--Selberg trace formula for the space of holomorphic Hilbert cusp forms over real quadratic fields of narrow class number one. While the classical Hurwitz class numbers are defined in terms of class numbers of imaginary quadratic fields, the generalized Hurwitz class numbers appearing in our Eichler--Selberg trace formula are defined in terms of class numbers of quartic CM fields. For applications of this Eichler--Selberg trace formula, we study the distribution of the generalized Hurwitz class numbers, prove class number relations, and carry out numerical computations of traces of Hecke operators for $\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{5})$ and $\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{29})$.

papers.title: On dynamical irreducible set of polynomials
papers.summary: In this article, a necessary and sufficient condition is proved for the dynamical irreducibility of a family of polynomials over a finite field. Using this result, an explicit construction of a dynamically irreducible set of polynomials is given over the finite field $\mathbb{F}_{p^p}$ where $p$ is a prime. Moreover, the existence of dynamically irreducible sets of size at least $p^2$ is also established over every finite field $\mathbb{F}_q$ where $q$ is a $p$ power. Finally, a bound on the cardinality of the set is given that needs to be tested for the dynamical irreducibility of a set of polynomials.

papers.title: Isolated Hypersurface Singularities May Be Stably Degenerate
papers.summary: We prove the existence of stably degenerate hypersurface singularities. Ingredients in the proof include the mixed Hodge structure on the contact locus of a singularity and that moduli spaces of polarised abelian varieties of large dimension are of general type.

papers.title: Exact Frequencies of Consecutive Quadratic Residue and Nonresidue Patterns Modulo a Prime
papers.summary: This paper determines the exact frequency of all consecutive sign patterns of lengths two and three formed by the quadratic character modulo an odd prime $p$. Using basic properties of character sums over finite fields, we derive exact counting formulas for pairs $(n, n+1)$ and triples $(n-1, n, n+1)$ exhibiting specific sequence patterns in \(\{\pm 1\}\). The frequencies of pairs are classified entirely by \(p \pmod 4\), whereas triples exhibit a more complex dependency on \(p \pmod 8\) and the Jacobsthal sum $T_p=\sum_{x\in\mathbb F_p}χ(x^3-x)$.

papers.title: Classification of equivariantly normal curves via Altmann-Hausen-Süss theory
papers.summary: Let the ground field be perfect of positive characteristic. Using Altmann-Hausen-Süss theory, we obtain a combinatorial classification of equivariantly normal curves with prescribed quotient in both the affine and projective settings. As a consequence, we derive an explicit upper bound on the number of isomorphism classes of equivariantly normal curves over a fixed base curve with prescribed branch locus. Furthermore, assuming that the ground field is algebraically closed, we determine, for a fixed cardinality of the branch locus, precisely when the set of isomorphism classes of equivariantly normal projective curves with prescribed quotient is finite and when it is infinite.

chinese_summary.problem: 在正特征代数闭域上分类等变正规曲线（包括仿射和射影情形），并给定基曲线和分支轨迹时确定同构类的数量界限。
chinese_summary.method: 利用Altmann-Hausen-Süss理论（基于环面嵌入和组合数据）将等变正规曲线转化为组合对象，通过分析该组合对象的分类来实现曲线的分类，并在射影情形下给出有限性判据。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将Altmann-Hausen-Süss理论首次应用于正特征代数闭域上的等变正规曲线分类，给出了明确的同构类上界；对于射影等变正规曲线，在固定分支轨迹基数条件下精确刻画了同构类集合何时有限或无限。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确给出了组合分类结果、同构类上界的推导以及有限性判据。但无实验或系统实现证据，理论推导为主要证据。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅适用于正特征代数闭域；需要阅读全文验证组合分类的具体构造以及上界公式的显式形式；未见与经典分类结果的对比。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接处理代数几何中曲线（scheme）的等变分类问题，涉及正规性、射影空间Proj、基变换等概念，与我的研究方向中的scheme、projective scheme、divisor类群等关键词相关，但更侧重等变情形和正特征，与我的主要兴趣（模空间、导出代数几何）相关性中等。

papers.title: Microlocal Bernstein--Sato polynomials on singular ambient varieties
papers.summary: We introduce the microlocal Bernstein--Sato polynomial of a function on a possibly singular ambient variety, extending the theory of Saito. We show that, contrary to the smooth ambient setting, these polynomials are not generally equal to the reduced $b$-functions obtained by removing the trivial root. We define the minimal exponent and use it to study the singularities of the divisor and the Hodge filtration on local cohomology. Our main results include a generalization of Saito's theorem relating the minimal exponent to rational singularities, a characterization of purity of local cohomology, a Thom--Sebastiani formula for the minimal exponent, and a linear combination formula for Bernstein--Sato polynomials of ideals. When the ambient variety is a complete intersection with rational singularities, we provide effective algorithms for these Bernstein--Sato polynomials and implement them in Macaulay2.

chinese_summary.problem: 定义和研究奇异簇上的微局域Bernstein–Sato多项式，推广Saito的理论，并利用最小指数研究除子的奇点以及局部上同调的Hodge滤过。
chinese_summary.method: 通过将微局域Bernstein–Sato多项式推广到可能的奇异簇上，定义并研究最小指数；利用该指数刻画有理奇点、局部上同调纯性，并建立Thom–Sebastiani公式和理想Bernstein–Sato多项式的线性组合公式；对于具有有理奇点的完全交簇，给出有效算法并在Macaulay2中实现。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次在奇异簇上定义微局域Bernstein–Sato多项式，并证明其与通常去除平凡根后的约化b-函数不等。2. 推广Saito定理，建立最小指数与有理奇点的关系，并刻画局部上同调纯性。3. 给出Thom–Sebastiani公式和理想的线性组合公式，为奇异簇上的奇点理论提供新工具。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中声称推广了Saito定理、建立了局部上同调纯性的刻画、给出了Thom–Sebastiani公式和线性组合公式，并在完全交的有理奇点簇上提供了有效算法的Macaulay2实现，但未提供具体实验数据或数值结果，需阅读全文验证。
chinese_summary.limitations: 算法仅适用于具有有理奇点的完全交簇，更一般情形需要进一步研究；微局域Bernstein–Sato多项式与经典b-函数的不等关系可能依赖具体奇点类型，需阅读全文确认适用范围。

papers.title: A nine-line counterexample to a conjecture on the minimal degree of Jacobian relations
papers.summary: We construct two arrangements of nine lines in the complex projective plane with isomorphic intersection lattices but with different minimal degrees of Jacobian relations. The common weak combinatorics is \[ (n_2,n_3,n_4)=(9,7,1), \] so the example is not the classical Ziegler-Yuzvinsky pair, whose weak combinatorics is $(n_{2},n_{3}) = (18,6)$. For the two defining equations $f$ and $g$ we prove \[ {\rm mdr}(f)=4,\qquad {\rm mdr}(g)=5. \] Since the degree is $d=9$, the first equality gives ${\rm mdr}(f)<d/2$. Hence the pair gives a counterexample to the Generalized Terao Conjecture.

papers.title: Functional Equations Characterize Dirichlet Characters
papers.summary: We prove a converse theorem for functional equations of Dirichlet $L$-functions. Under mild assumptions, we prove that these functional equations for $L$-series of the form $\sum_{n\ge 1} f(n) n^{-s}$ force the coefficient function $f$ to be a primitive Dirichlet character. Consequently, these functional equations force the existence of an Euler product.

chinese_summary.problem: 证明Dirichlet L-函数泛函方程的反向定理：从形如∑ f(n) n^{-s}的L-级数满足给定的泛函方程，推出系数函数f必须是原初Dirichlet特征。
chinese_summary.method: 利用泛函方程和温和的解析假设（如解析延拓、函数方程形式等），通过分析系数函数f的卷积和与Gamma因子等结构，推导f的完全乘性，并建立与Dirichlet特征对应的局部因子关系，最终证明f是原初Dirichlet特征，从而L级数具有欧拉积。
chinese_summary.innovation: 经典结果是Dirichlet特征导出泛函方程，本文首次证明逆命题成立：在温和假设下，泛函方程唯一刻画了Dirichlet特征；同时自动推出欧拉积的存在性，无需预先假设乘法性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中声称已通过解析方法证明，但未提供具体证明步骤或数值实验，因此证据依赖全文验证。
chinese_summary.limitations: 所需的“温和假设”的具体条件需阅读全文确认；结果局限于经典Dirichlet L-函数，不直接适用于更一般的自守L-函数或算术几何中的L-函数；可能涉及较深的解析数论技巧，与算术几何的代数方法有距离。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 匹配关键词“L-function”、“Euler product”、“Dirichlet character”；与研究方向中的模形式、L-函数有间接联系，尤其有助于理解L-函数泛函方程的结构特征，但论文不涉及Galois表示或上同调理论，相关性中等。

papers.title: On generic finiteness of pluricanonical maps of threefolds of general type
papers.summary: We prove that $|6K_X|$ defines a generically finite map for all minimal 3-folds $X$ of general type with $P_2(X)\geq 2$, which is optimal. We also prove that $|nK_X|$ defines a generically finite map for all minimal 3-folds $X$ of general type when $n\geq 38$. The essential technical ingredients of this paper are a new generic finiteness criterion for surfaces and an effective comparison inequality under a special resolution.

chinese_summary.problem: 确定一般型三维极小簇X的pluricanonical映射|nK_X|成为generic finite的最小整数n，并在特殊条件下（P2(X)≥2）给出最优界n=6，一般情形下给出上界n=38。
chinese_summary.method: 利用新的曲面generic finiteness准则与特殊分解下的有效比较不等式，通过归纳和技巧将三维问题归结为曲面情形，从而得到最优和一般性结果。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次证明|6K_X|在P2(X)≥2时对极小三维一般型簇给出generic finite映射，达到最优；同时将一般情形上界从之前的较大常数降至n≥38，改进了已知的pluricanonical映射有限性结果。
chinese_summary.evidence: 论文摘要明确给出了两个定理的陈述，但未提供实验或计算验证，属于纯理论证明，是否完备需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.limitations: 结果仅适用于极小三维簇且一般型，未覆盖非极小或更高维情形；最优性依赖于P2(X)≥2条件；证明中的关键准则和比较不等式需要全文核实其正确性和适用性（如特征0或正特征限制）。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文研究一般型三维簇的pluricanonical映射，属于代数几何中双有理几何与极小模型理论的核心问题，与研究方向关键词'variety'、'divisor'、'canonical divisor'、'birational geometry'等密切相关，同时涉及'general type'和'pluricanonical map'等代数几何标准概念。

papers.title: Reductive monoids over general base
papers.summary: We develop a theory of affine algebraic monoids over general base schemes whose unit groups are split reductive groups. Our main result is a classification theorem for such objects, generalizing works of Vinberg and Rittatore over a field. As applications, we obtain combinatorial descriptions and normality properties of orbit closures, prove a Steinberg-type theorem on adjoint quotients of reductive monoids over general base schemes, and construct finite type integral models of the Vinberg monoids. A main tool in our construction is Lusztig's theory of modified quantum groups and their canonical bases.

chinese_summary.method: 论文利用Lusztig的修正量子群及其典范基理论，推广了Vinberg和Rittatore在域上的工作，通过组合描述和轨道闭包的正规性分析，以及构造Vinberg幺半群的有限型积分模型来实现分类。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 将仿射代数幺半群的分类从域推广到一般底概形，给出了统一的组合描述。2. 证明了轨道闭包的正规性，并建立了Steinberg型定理。3. 构造了Vinberg幺半群的有限型积分模型，这些是域上已知结果的新推广。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中声明了主要结果（分类定理、轨道闭包正规性、Steinberg型定理、积分模型构造），但未提供具体实验或数值证据，属于理论证明。
chinese_summary.limitations: 需要阅读全文以确认分类定理的具体陈述和证明细节，以及Lusztig理论在一般底概形上的适用条件；可能仅限于分裂约化群情形，对非分裂群未涵盖。
